rows.notes: Clear, centered page year at top. Numerals are crisp and unambiguous.
Clear centered heading under the year. Handwriting legible and clearly a section title.
Left-margin date. Legible but slightly faint; clearly a date/label with no monetary amounts.
Description and numeric columns are clear. Pounds '50' aligns between first and second ruling lines; shillings and pence read '0 0'. All fields valid.

Description handwriting slightly ambiguous (the leading '11 16' looks like counts), but the monetary columns are clear: pounds '2', shillings '15', pence '0'. Column alignment unambiguous and values within valid ranges.

Description partly ambiguous (the '2/6' fraction in description is handwritten), but the amount is clearly '1 17 6' in the pounds/shillings/pence columns. Pence '6' is clear; all currency values validate.

Large pounds value '736' is clearly written and aligns well with the pounds column. The description is legible though the final letter of 'College' is slightly compressed; shillings '2' and pence '0' are unambiguous.

rows.description: Balance of, now carried to account
rows.notes: Phrase indicates a balance carried forward (classed as a total). Amount '7 15 0' is clearly aligned in the monetary columns; wording contains a small ampersand/comma ambiguity but meaning is clear.
Final total written lower on the page as '798 9 6'. Numbers align with the pounds/shillings/pence columns and match the sum of the line items above, confirming accuracy.
